title: TaidumCraft
description: A furry-themed modpack focusing on exploration, immersion, adventure, and accessibility: made by taidums, for taidums, of taidums.
body:
TaidumCraft

A furry-themed modpack focusing on exploration, immersion, adventure, and accessibility: made by taidums, for taidums, of taidums.
Our goal with this pack is to create a light-hearted and fun Minecraft experience with lots of cute fluff. The entire pack can be played without the need for a wiki or youtube tutorials. If that sounds like fun, then this pack is for you!


Features

Taidumcraft has many fancy features, read about them here!
The lists below only go into the general features of the pack.
For a exhaustive list of mods, check the dependencies of the latest release

Main Content
  • Explore a beatifully generated world powered by Terralith and Oh The Biomes You'll Go
  • Meet a ton of new Animals and pets with Naturalist and Critters and Companions
  • Use the Create Mod to automate every last bit of your experience in a visually satsfying way
  • Go cavediving, finding new oddities with the Spelunkery Mod
  • Delve into beatifully crafted dungeons and collect cute treasure
  • Explore the depths of foreign dimensions like the Bumblezone and the Otherside
  • Plant new crops and make delicious meals with farmers delight and farmers respite
  • Experience the changing of the seasons with Fabric Seasons
  • Decorate your base with the thousands of blocks offered by Chipped, Another Furniture and Create Deco
  • and Finally, GO TO SPACE WITH AD ASTRA (with a brand new progression)
Audio & Visuals
  • Includes a modified version of the Complimentary Reimagined Shaderpack with support for all dimensions and blocks
  • Fancy animations for the player, mobs and even food
  • More particle effects (water splashes, falling leaves, mob particles)
  • Dynamic sound reverb with ingame Voicechat
  • Rich and detailed sound effects and Lush ambient sounds
  • Tactile UI sounds
QOL & Accessibility
  • No wiki necessary: everything is explained in-game through tooltips and "Ponders"
  • The Intuitive and powerful recipe viewer EMI
  • More Informative UI and HUD
  • Tweaks to vanilla features like the stonecutter and bookshelves
  • A ton of optimization mods to keep your game running smoothly
Furry Fun!
  • Recreate your own fursona in minecraft with the Ears mod
    Using this skin preset we made and this handy online tool you can get easily started
  • New fuzzy pets to tame
  • Cute collectible Blahaj and Taidum Plushie
  • Craftable banana Bread!!!!
Credits And Sources
  • illumnations made by doctor4t
  • Anchor made by moonflowerteam and RENREN
  • Etched made by jackson from moonflowerteam
  • structory made by botanydev
  • Create Deco made by talrey
  • Farmers Respite by lumpazl
  • Auditory by Sydokiddo
  • Create Crafts and Additions by mrh0
  • The Taidum is a creation of Irix and we have full permission to use it in this pack (see image below)
